registerPage.chooseType: Sidee ayaad rabtaa inaad u isticmaasho ChatGameLab?
registerPage.description: Waxaan u isticmaalnaa Auth0 sidii bixiyaha xaqiijinta si aan u maamulno akoonnada isticmaalaha. Waxaa lagu leexin doonaa Auth0 si aad u abuurto akoonkaaga, dabadeedna halkan ayaa laguugu soo celin doonaa si aad u dhammaystirto profile-kaaga.
registerPage.educatorDescription: U isticmaal ChatGameLab aqoon-is-weydaarsiyo, fasallo, ama ururkaaga

educatorModal.eduInfo: Ka ogow wax badan oo ku saabsan isticmaalka ChatGameLab ujeeddooyin waxbarasho:
educatorModal.intro: Si aad ChatGameLab ula isticmaasho ururkaaga (iskuul, jaamacad, hay'ad), fadlan raac tallaabooyinkan:
educatorModal.step1Description: U horay u samee akoonkaaga shakhsiyeed. Tani waxay noqon doontaa gelitaankaaga madasha.
educatorModal.step3: 3. Annaga ayaa u qaabayn doona ururkaaga
educatorModal.step3Description: Waxaan abuuri doonaa ururkaaga oo waxaan kugu dari doonaa madax ahaan. Dabadeed waxaad casuumi kartaa asxaabta oo aad dejin kartaa aqoon-is-weydaarsiyo.
educatorModal.title: Gelitaanka Macallimiinta & Xirfadlayaasha

aboutSection.description: Furayaasha API-ga waxaa loo isticmaalaa in lagu xiro aaladaha AI si loo abuuro nuxurka ciyaarta. Furaha la xushay (lagu calaamadeeyay jeeg) ayaa si caadi ah loo adeegsan doonaa marka la samaynayo kulamada ciyaarta cusub.
aboutSection.title: Ku saabsan Furayaasha API

aiQualityTier.description: Dooro heerka tayada AI ee ciyaarahaaga marka aad adeegsaneysid furaha API-gaaga. Heerarka sare waxay ku kacaan badan yihiin laakiin waxaa laga yaabaa inay tayadoodu fiicnaato. Ka tag madhan si aad u isticmaasho dejinta server-ka.

createModal.keyDescription: Furahaaga waa la sirayn doonaa si ammaan ahna waa lagu kaydin doonaa.

errors.aiError: Adeegga AI ayaa la kulmay khalad. Fadlan isku day mar kale.
errors.backendUserFetch: Ku guuldareystay in server-ka laga soo raro xogta isticmaalaha. Fadlan isku day mar kale.
errors.billingNotActive: Akunkaaga OpenAI firfircoon ma aha. Fadlan eeg faahfaahinta lacag bixinta ee https://platform.openai.com/settings/organization/billing.
errors.conflict: Fal-maalmeedkan wuxuu la isku dhacay xogta jirta. Fadlan isku day mar kale.
errors.contentFiltered: Codsigaaga waxaa shaandheeyey siyaasadda nuxurka AI. Fadlan isku day inaad dib u qeexdo.
errors.duplicateName: Magacan ciyaarta horay ayaa loo isticmaalay. Fadlan dooro magac kale.
errors.forbidden: Ma lihid oggolaansho aad ku sameyso ficilkan.
errors.generic: Waxbaa qaldamay. Fadlan isku day mar kale.
errors.insufficientQuota: Furahaaga API ayaa ka dhammaaday deynta. Fadlan ku dar credit ama isticmaal fure kale.
errors.invalidApiKey: Furahaaga API waa khalad ama wuu dhacay. Fadlan hubi dejimahaaga.
errors.invalidJsonSchema: Qeexidda ciyaarta ayaa soo saartay shax aan sax ahayn oo loogu talagalay AI. Tani waa arrin dejinta ciyaarta ku saabsan, ma aha fure API. Fadlan hubi goobaha qiimaha ciyaarta oo isku day mar kale.
errors.invalidPlatform: Madasha la doortay waa khalad. Fadlan dooro ikhtiyaar sax ah.
errors.invalidToken: Kal-fadhigaagu wuu dhacay ama ma shaqeynayo. Fadlan isticmaal link-ga casuumaadda mar kale.
errors.nameProfane: Magacan lama oggola. Fadlan dooro magac kale.
errors.nameTooLong: Magacu aad buu u dheer yahay. Fadlan dooro magac gaaban.
errors.network: Khalad shabakad. Fadlan hubi isku xirkaaga.
errors.noApiKey: Fure API looma heli karo ciyaartan. Kafaalaqaadku wuxuu ka saaray furaha, ama waa inaad dejisaa fure kuu gaar ah.
errors.orgVerificationRequired: Ururkaaga OpenAI wuxuu u baahan yahay xaqiijin si uu u isticmaalo sawir-samaynta. Fadlan ku xaqiiji https://platform.openai.com/settings/organization/general.
errors.previousResponseNotFound: AI-gu wuu ka lumay wada hadalkan. Tani waxay dhici kartaa marka kal-fadhi muddo furan yahay. Fadlan bilaaw kal-fadhi cusub si aad u sii wadato ciyaarta.
errors.rateLimitExceeded: Codsiyo aad u badan. Fadlan sug oo mar kale isku day.
errors.server: Khalad server. Fadlan mar dambe isku day.
errors.unauthorized: Fadlan gal si aad u sii wadato.
errors.unexpected: Wax lama filaan ah ayaa dhacay.
errors.userNotRegistered: Waa inaad dhammaystirtaa isdiiwaangelinta kahor intaadan sii wadin.
errors.validation: Fadlan hubi xogtaada oo isku day mar kale.
errors.workshopInactive: Aqoon-is-weydaarsigan waa la damiyay. Fadlan la xiriir macalinkaaga ama qabanqaabiyaha aqoon-is-weydaarsiga.

error.missingFields: Ciyaartu waxay ka maqan tahay goobaha lagama maarmaanka ah:

noApiKey.banner: Fure API oo la isticmaali karo lagama helin madasha {{platform}}. Si aad u sii ciyaarto, ku dar furahaaga API dejimaha akoonkaaga.
noApiKey.personal: Waa inaad dejisaa fure API kahor intaadan ciyaarin. U tag dejinta Furaha API si aad mid ugu darto.
noApiKey.title: Fure API Lama Hayo
noApiKey.workshop: Fure API looma dejin aqoon-is-weydaarsigan. Fadlan la xiriir maamulaha aqoon-is-weydaarsiga.

error.sendFailed: Ku guuldareystay in la diro farriinta. Fadlan isku day mar kale.

input.audioUnavailableMessage: Gelinta codka laguma heli karo dejimaha furaha API ee hadda. Si aad u isticmaasho cod, u beddel heer tayo sare (Premium ama Max).

needsApiKey.description: Furaha API ee kal-fadhigan loo isticmaalay hadda ma jiro.
needsApiKey.reason: Furaha API-gaaga hore ma jiro. Si aad u sii wadato ciyaartaada, fadlan dooro fure cusub.
needsApiKey.title: Fure API ayaa loo baahan yahay

selectApiKey.keyDescription: Dooro furaha API-ga ee loo isticmaali doono kalfadhigan ciyaarta
selectApiKey.loadError: Furayaasha API lama soo dejin karo
selectApiKey.modelDescription: Ikhtiyaari ahaan dooro moodel AI gaar ah
selectApiKey.noKeys: Waxaad u baahan tahay ugu yaraan hal fure API si aad u ciyaarto. Ku dar mid Settings → API Keys.

deleteModal.title: Tirtir Ciyaar
deleteModal.warning: Tallaabadan lama celin karo. Dhammaan xogta ciyaarta si joogto ah ayaa loo tirtiri doonaa.

editFields.description: Ciyaarta u sharax si kooban. Tani adiga ayaa kaliya u ah mana saameynayso ciyaarta.
editFields.gameStartHint: Maxaa dhacaya bilowga? Sharax goobta koowaad ee ciyaaryahanku arko. Sidee ayaa loo soo dhaweynayaa?
editFields.gameStartPlaceholder: Waxaad ku soo toostaa cidhifka kayn mugdi ah. Jid dhuuban ayaa u sii jeeda gudaha...
editFields.imageStyle: Sawirrada ciyaarta noocee bay u ekaadaan?
editFields.imageStyleHint: Tusaale: kartoon, dhab ah, pixel art, watercolor...
editFields.name: Magaca Ciyaarta
editFields.scenarioHint:
Si kooban u sharax: Ciyaartu sidee u shaqeysaa? Dunidu sidee bay tahay? Luuqad & Laxaad (tusaale Isbaanish ardayda fasalka 6aad)?
Ciyaaryahanku waxa uu leeyahay door noocee ah? Ku bilow "Ciyaaryahanku ...".
Haddii aad rabto in AI-gu qaato qof gaar ah, qor "Adigu waxaad tahay ...".
editFields.scenarioPlaceholder: Waxaad tahay sahamiyayaal ku jira kayn qarsoon. Ujeedadaadu waa inaad hesho khasnad qarin...
editFields.statusFieldsHint: Maxaa lagu haynayaa ciyaarta? Tusaale caafimaad, dhibco, ama rasaas. Ciyaartu waxay xasuusanaysaa qiimahan oo way cusboonaysiisaa inta lagu jiro ciyaarta.

unsavedChanges.message: Waxaad leedahay isbeddello aan la kaydin. Ma hubtaa inaad ka tagto?

privateShare.active: Wadaagga gaarka ah waa shaqaynayaa. Qof kasta oo haysta link-ga hoose wuxuu ciyaartan u ciyaari karaa si qarsoodi ah.
privateShare.description: Abuur link gaara si qof kasta oo haysta uu ciyaartan si qarsoodi ah ugu ciyaaro. Adiga ayaa dooranaya furaha API ee bixiya kulamada.
privateShare.loadingKeys: Furayaasha API ayaa la soo rarayaa...
privateShare.maxSessionsDescription: Ka tag madhan si loo oggolaado kulamo aan xadidneyn.
privateShare.noEligibleKeys: Ma jiro fure API oo shaqaynaya. Marka hore fure ku dar Dejinta Furayaasha API.
privateShare.selectKeyPlaceholder: Dooro fure ku bixiya kulamada martida...

createModal.publicDescription: Ciyaaraha dadweynaha waxaa arki kara oo ciyaari kara dhammaan isticmaalayaasha madashan.

sponsor.confirmExplanation: Markaad kafaalo qaaddo ciyaartan, furahaaga API ayaa bixin doona kulamadiisa oo dhan. Qof kasta oo ciyaara wuxuu adeegsan doonaa furahaaga - kharashka kulankiiba adiga ayaa iska bixinaya.
sponsor.confirmNote: Mar kasta waad ka jari kartaa kafaalo si aad uga baxdo dejimaha ciyaarta ama maamulka furaha API.
sponsor.currentlySponsored: Ciyaartan hadda waa la kafaalo qaaday. Furaha API ee kafaalaqaadka ayaa bixinaya kulamadeeda oo dhan.
sponsor.description: Kafaalo qaad ciyaartan si qof waliba lacag la'aan ugu ciyaaro. Furahaaga API ayaa dabooli doona kharashka AI ee kulamadeeda oo dhan.
sponsor.gameStartMessage: Ciyaartan waa la kafaalo qaaday - qof deeqsi ah ayaa daboolaya kharashyada AI si aad u ciyaarto lacag la'aan. Ku raaxayso!
sponsor.loadingKeys: Furayaasha API ayaa la soo rarayaa...
sponsor.noEligibleKeys: Ma lihid furayaal API oo kafaalo guud u oggol. U tag Dejinta Furayaasha API oo daar "U oggolow kafaalo guud" fure ka hor.
sponsor.privateWarning: Haddii aad ka dhigto ciyaartan mid gaar loo leeyahay, kafaalo guud waa laga saari doonaa.
sponsor.selectKeyPlaceholder: Dooro fure aad ku kafaalo qaaddo...
sponsor.sponsoredTooltip: Ciyaartan waa la kafaalo qaaday - waxaad ku ciyaari kartaa lacag la'aan! Abuuraha ciyaarta ama taageere ayaa daboolaya kharashyada AI.
sponsor.title: Kafaalo qaad Ciyaar

statusFieldsEditor.noFields: Weli qiime ma jiro. Riix + si aad u darto qiime cusub.

tabs.basicInfo: Macluumaadka guud ee ciyaarta. Adiga kaliya ayay kuu tahay mana saameyneyso gameplay.
tabs.storyInfo: Wax kasta oo halkan ku qoran AI-ga ayaa loo diraa si uu u hagaajiyo dunidaada iyo sheekada.
tabs.styleInfo: Dejino ikhtiyaari ah oo ku saabsan muuqaalka ciyaarta inta la ciyaarayo.

theme.animationDescription: Ka beddel anshaxa horay u dejisan ee preset-ka
theme.noTheme: Lama dooran mawduuc. AI-ga ayaa u abuuraya mid kasta oo kulan ah.
theme.removeConfirm: Miyaad ka saareysaa mawduuca caadada ah? AI-ga ayaa halkiisa mid u abuuraya kulankasta.
theme.sampleGame: Albaabku wuxuu si tartiib ah u furmaa, wuxuuna muujinayaa qol iftiin yar leh. Calaamado qadiimi ah ayaa si khafiif ah ugu ifaya darbiyada dhagaxa.
theme.sampleGame2: Waxaad si taxadar leh u soo dhowaataa sanduuqa. Markay farahaagu taabtaan qufulka qabow, calaamadaha darbigu waxay bilaabaan inay dhalaalaan.
theme.samplePlayer: Waxaan furayaa albaabka alwaaxda duugga ah...
theme.thinkingTextDescription: Qoraalka la soo bandhigo inta AI-gu ka fekerayo

createModal.title: Ciyaaraha Aan Abuuray

viewModal.readOnlyNotice: Ciyaartan waxaa abuuray isticmaale kale. Waxaad arkaysaa faahfaahinta laakiin ma wax ka beddeli kartid. Isticmaal "Nuqul" si aad u abuurto nuqul adiga kuu gaar ah.
viewModal.title: Faahfaahinta Ciyaarta

deleteModal.adminActionWarning: Waxaad tirtiraysaa ciyaar aadan lahayn. Tani waa ficil maamulka ah waana in kaliya loo isticmaalaa ujeeddooyinka kormeerka.
deleteModal.moderatorActionWarning: Ciyaartani waxay ka tirsan tahay ka qaybgalaha aqoon-is-weydaarsigaaga. Haddii la tirtiro si joogto ah ayaa looga tirtiri doonaa iyaga. Lama soo celin karo.
deleteModal.title: Tirtir Ciyaarta
deleteModal.warning: Ficilkan lama celin karo. Dhammaan xogta ciyaarta si joogto ah ayaa loo tirtiri doonaa.

editFields.description: Sii ciyaarta sharaxaad gaaban. Tani waa adiga oo keliya mana saamayn doonto ciyaarta.
editFields.gameStartHint: Sidee ayuu ciyaartu ku bilaabmaa? Waa maxay muuqaalka ugu horreeya? Sidee ciyaartoyga loo soo dhaweeyaa?
editFields.gameStartPlaceholder: Waad soo toosaysaa agagaarka keyd mugdi ah. Jid cidhiidhi ah ayaa ku hogaaminaya gudaha geedaha...
editFields.imageStyle: Noocee qaab ahaan sawirrada ciyaarta lagu rabaa?
editFields.imageStyleHint: Tusaale: kartuun, xaqiiqo ah, farshaxan pixel, biyo rinji...
editFields.name: Magaca Ciyaarta
editFields.scenarioHint:
Si kooban u sharax: Sidee ayuu ciyaartu u shaqeeyaa? Sidee ayay aduunka ciyaartu u egyahay? Luqadda 6 Codka (tusaale Isbaanish loogu talagalay ardayda fasalka 6aad)?
Waa maxay doorka ciyaartoyga? Qor "Ciyaartoygu ...".
Haddii aad rabto in AI ay qaadato doorka qof gaar ah qor "Adigu waxaad tahay ...".
editFields.scenarioPlaceholder: Adigu waxaad tahay sahmiyaha keyn qarsoon. Himiladaadu waa inaad hesho khasnad qarsoon...
editFields.statusFieldsHint: Waa maxay qiimayaasha uu ciyaartu xafidi doono? Tusaale nolosha, dhibcaha, ama rasaasta. Ciyaartu way xasuusan doontaa qiimayaashan oo way cusbooneysiin doontaa inta lagu jiro ciyaarta.

editModal.adminActionWarning: Waxaad wax ka beddelayso ciyaar aadan lahayn. Tani waa ficil maamulka ah waana in kaliya loo isticmaalaa ujeeddooyinka kormeerka.
editModal.title: Tafatir Ciyaarta

apiKeys.aboutDescription: Furayaasha API ee halkan lagu wadaago waxaa heli kara dhammaan xubnaha ururka si ay ciyaaro ugu ciyaaraan. Kaliya madaxda iyo macallimiintu maamuli karaan furayaashan.
apiKeys.allowPublicSponsoringDesc: Furahani wuxuu lagu kafaalo qaadi karaa ciyaaro qof walba u furan.

freeUseKey.description: Deji fure isticmaal bilaash ah si xubnaha ururka oo dhan ay ciyaaro ugu ciyaaraan iyagoo aan fure u baahnayn. Kaliya furayaasha hore ururkan loola wadaagay ayaa la dooran karaa.
freeUseKey.title: Fure Isticmaal Bilaash

workshops.activeDescription: Aqoon-is-weydaarrada firfircoon waxay u oggolaanayaan ka-qaybgalayaasha inay ku biiraan oo ciyaaro abuuraan.
workshops.aiQualityTierHint: Heerka tayada jawaabaha AI. Heerarka sare waxay ku kacaan badan yihiin balse tayadoodu way fiicnaan kartaa. Madhan waxay isticmaashaa dejinta server-ka.
workshops.defaultApiKeyHint: Ka qaybgalayaashu waxay isticmaali doonaan furahan API marka ay ciyaaro ciyaarayaan.
workshops.deleteWarning: Dhammaan ciyaaraha iyo kal-fadhiyada aqoon-is-weydaarsigan waa la tirtiri doonaa. Tani lama celin karo.
workshops.designEditingEnabled: U oggol ka qaybgalayaasha inay wax ka beddelaan naqshadda ciyaarta (mawduuca)
workshops.inviteDescription: Abuur link casuumaad ah oo ay ka qaybgalayaashu ku biiraan aqoon-is-weydaarsigan.
workshops.inviteLinkDescription: La wadaag link-gan si ka qaybgalayaashu ugu biiraan aqoon-is-weydaarsiga.
workshops.isPausedHint: Marka la joojiyo, ka qaybgalayaashu waxay arki doonaan quful mana la falgali karaan ciyaaraha
workshops.linkCopiedMessage: Link-ga casuumaadda waxaa lagu koobiyeeyay qalinkaaga.
workshops.loadError: Ku guuldareystay in la soo raro aqoon-is-weydaarrada.
workshops.noDefaultApiKey: Fure API caadi ah ma jiro
workshops.noParticipantToken: Ka qaybgalahan link casuumaad ma leh. Kaliya ka qaybgalayaasha qarsoon (martida) ayaa leh linkyo dib loo adeegsan karo.
workshops.notAuthorized: Ma lihid oggolaansho inaad maamusho aqoon-is-weydaarrada. Kaliya madaxda iyo macallimiintu geli karaan boggan.

workshops.shareParticipantLink: Nuqul link gaar ah oo ka qaybgalahan
workshops.subtitle: Maamul aqoon-is-weydaarro oo ka casuum ka qaybgalayaal inay si wadajir ah u abuuraan ciyaaro.

privateShare.aiQualityTierDescription: Dooro tayada moodeelka AI ee martida isticmaasha isku xirkan wadaagga.
privateShare.editModalTitle: Wax ka beddel Isku-xir Wadaag Gaar ah
privateShare.noPersonalShare: Ma jiro isku-xir wadaag shakhsi ama urur ah oo jira. Waxaad ka abuuri kartaa banaanka aqoon-is-weydaarsiga.
privateShare.orgShareDescription: Isku-xirka wadaagga ururka - martidu waxay ciyaaraan iyagoo isticmaalaya furaha API ee ururka.
privateShare.personalCreateHint: Abuur isku-xir gaar loo leeyahay si qof kasta oo haysta uu si qarsoodi ah ugu ciyaaro ciyaartan. Adiga ayaa dooranaya furaha API ee bixinaya kharashaadka fadhiyada.
privateShare.personalShareDescription: Isku-xirkaaga wadaagga shakhsiyeed - martidu waxay ciyaaraan iyagoo isticmaalaya furaha API ee aad dooratay.
privateShare.workshopCreateHint: Abuur isku-xir wadaag oo loogu talagalay ciyaartan. Furaha API ee aqoon-is-weydaarsiga ayaa si toos ah loo doortaa oo daboolaya kharashaadka.
privateShare.workshopDescription: Abuur isku-xir wadaag oo ciyaartan ah. Furaha API ee caadiga ah ee aqoon-is-weydaarsiga ayaa si toos ah loogu isticmaali doonaa fadhiyada martida.
privateShare.workshopShareDescription: Isku-xirkan waxa laga abuuray aqoon-is-weydaarsi "{{name}}" - martidu waxay ciyaaraan iyagoo isticmaalaya furaha API ee aqoon-is-weydaarsiga.

games.removeWarning: Isticmaalahan wuxuu lumi doonaa gelitaanka ururka.

defaultTier.description: Heerka ka imanaya server-ka oo loo isticmaalo marka aan heer gaar ah laga dejin aqoon-is-weydaarsi, hay’ad ama isticmaale. Heerarka sare waxay ku kacaan badan yihiin laakiin tayadoodu way fiicnaan kartaa.
defaultTier.title: Heerka Tayada AI ee Caadiga ah

freeUseKey.description: Deji fure API oo guud si dhammaan isticmaaleyaasha server-kan ay ciyaaro ugu ciyaaraan iyagoo aan fure u baahnayn. Furahan waxaa la adeegsadaa marka fure aqoon-is-weydaarsi ama urur la heli waayo.
freeUseKey.noKeys: Ma lihid furayaal API. Marka hore ku dar mid Dejinta Furayaasha API.
freeUseKey.replacePlaceholder: Ku beddel mid ka mid ah furayaashaaga API...
freeUseKey.selectPlaceholder: Dooro mid ka mid ah furayaashaaga API...
freeUseKey.title: Furaha API ee Isticmaal Bilaash
freeUseKey.unknownKey: Fure aan la aqoon (waxaa laga yaabaa in la tirtiray)

freeUseTier.description: Heerka tayada ee la isticmaalo marka furaha API ee bilaashka ahi shaqaynayo. Heerarka sare waxay ku kacaan badan yihiin laakiin tayadoodu way fiicnaan kartaa. Ka tag madhan si aad u isticmaasho heerka caadiga ah.
freeUseTier.title: Heerka Tayada AI ee Isticmaal Bilaash

serverSettings.notAuthorized: Ma lihid oggolaansho aad ku gasho dejimaha server-ka. Xuquuq maamule ayaa loo baahan yahay.
serverSettings.title: Dejimaha Server-ka

deleteConfirm.message: Ma hubtaa inaad tirtirto kal-fadhigan ee "{{game}}"? Tallaabadan lama celin karo.
deleteConfirm.title: Tirtir Kal-fadhi

empty.description: Ku bilow ciyaar cusub si aad tacabur uga bilaabato!
empty.title: Wali lama ciyaarin

errors.loadFailed: Ku guuldareystay in la soo raro ciyaarahaaga. Fadlan isku day mar kale.

freeUseKey.description: Deji fure isticmaal bilaash ah si xubnaha ururka oo dhan ay ciyaaro ugu ciyaaraan iyagoo aan fure u baahnayn. Kaliya furayaasha hore ururkan loola wadaagay ayaa la dooran karaa.
freeUseKey.title: Fure Isticmaal Bilaash

sharing.privateShareLinkDescription: Isku-xirrada wadaagga gaarka ah waxaa lala wadaagi karaa dadka kale. Qof kasta oo haysta isku-xirka wuxuu ciyaari karaa ciyaarta si qarsoodi ah asagoo aan akoon lahayn. Waa in la doortaa furaha API si uu u daboolo kharashaadka.
sharing.publicGameWorkshopHint: Tani waa ciyaar dadweyne oo qayb ka ah aqoon-is-weydaarsigaaga ma aha. Ikhtiyaarada wadaagista lagama heli karo ciyaaraha dadweynaha marka la joogo habka aqoon-is-weydaarsiga.
sharing.publicSponsoringDescription: Dhammaan isticmaalayaasha madasha waxay ciyaartan u ciyaari karaan bilaash - furaha API ee laguugu qoondeeyey ayaa daboolaya kharashaadka.

sponsor.noEligibleKeys: Ma haysatid wax furayaal API ah oo diyaar u ah kafaala-qaadista. Marka hore ku dar fure API dejimahaaga.

statusFieldsEditor.noFields: Qiimayaal ma jiraan. Guji + si aad qiime cusub u darto.

tabs.basicInfo: Macluumaad guud oo ku saabsan ciyaarta. Tani waa adiga oo keliya mana saameyn doonto ciyaarta.
tabs.storyInfo: Wax kasta halkan waxaa loo diraa AI-ga si loo qaabeeyo adduunkaaga ciyaarta iyo sheekada.
tabs.styleInfo: Dejimo ikhtiyaari ah oo loogu talagalay muuqaalka ciyaarta inta lagu jiro ciyaarista.

games.title: Ciyaaraha aan Abuuray

viewModal.readOnlyNotice: Ciyaartan waxaa abuuray isticmaaleyaal kale. Waxaad arki kartaa faahfaahinta balse ma tafatiri kartid. Isticmaal "Nuqul" si aad u abuurto nuqul aad ka tafatiri karto.
viewModal.title: Faahfaahinta Ciyaarta

constraints.description: Qeex xeerar AI oo khasab ah oo ku saleysan kooxda da'da ciyaaryahanka. Xaddidaadahan waxaa lagu duraa jawaab kasta oo AI ah. Waxay khuseeyaan dhammaan isticmaalayaasha soo galay ee ka baxsan habka aqoon-is-weydaarsiga.
constraints.title: Kicinta Xaddidaadaha Ku saleysan Da'da
constraints.u13Hint: Waxay ku dhex jirtaa jab kasta oo AI ah ee isticmaaleyaasha soo galay ee da'doodu tahay 13-17 iyadoo aan oggolaansho waalid keydka ku jirin.
constraints.u13Label: Xayiraadda isticmaalayaasha da'doodu tahay 13-17, oggolaansho waalid la' (U13)
constraints.u13Placeholder: tusaale ahaan: Ka dhig dhammaan nuxurka si adag ugu habboon dhallinyarada. Rabshad ma jirto, nuxur jacayl ma jiro, mowduucyo argagax ma jiraan.
constraints.u13pHint: Waxay ku dhex jirtaa jab kasta oo AI ah ee isticmaaleyaasha soo galay ee da'doodu tahay 13-17 iyadoo oggolaansho waalid keydka ku jiro.
constraints.u13pLabel: Xayiraadda isticmaalayaasha da'doodu tahay 13-17, iyadoo oggolaansho waalid jiro (U13p)
constraints.u13pPlaceholder: tusaale ahaan: Nuxur ku habboon da'da dhalinyarada ay waalidkoodu oggolaadeen. Qaar ka mid ah mowduucyo qaangaar ah waa la oggol yahay, nuxur cad-cad lama oggola.
constraints.u18Hint: Waxaa lagu dura AI prompt kasta isticmaalayaasha soo galay ee da'doodu tahay 18 iyo ka badan.
constraints.u18Placeholder: tusaale ahaan: Ka dhig nuxurka mid habboon. Ka fogow rabshado cad ama nuxur galmo.

errors.aiError: Adeega AI-ga ayaa la kulmay khalad. Fadlan isku day mar kale.
errors.backendUserFetch: Xogta isticmaalaha lagama soo qaadi karin server-ka. Fadlan isku day mar kale.
errors.billingNotActive: Akoonkaaga OpenAI ma firfircoon. Fadlan hubi faahfaahinta lacag-bixintaada: https://platform.openai.com/settings/organization/billing.
errors.conflict: Ficilkan wuxuu khilaafsan yahay xog horay u jirtay. Fadlan isku day mar kale.
errors.contentFiltered: Codsigaaga waxaa shaandheeyay siyaasadda nuxurka ee AI. Fadlan dib u habee codsigaaga.
errors.forbidden: Ma haysid oggolaansho aad ficilkan ku fuliso.
errors.generic: Wax qaldamay. Fadlan isku day mar kale.
errors.insufficientQuota: Furahaaga API-ga wuxuu ka dhamaaday credit-ka. Fadlan ku dar credit ama isticmaal fure kale.
errors.invalidApiKey: Furahaaga API-ga waa mid aan sax ahayn ama dhacay. Fadlan hubi furahaaga Settings.
errors.invalidPlatform: Madal aan sax ahayn ayaa la doortay. Fadlan dooro ikhtiyaar sax ah.
errors.invalidToken: Kalfadhigaga wuu dhacay ama ma saxna. Fadlan mar kale isticmaal link-ga casuumaaddaada.
errors.orgVerificationRequired: Ururkaaga OpenAI wuxuu u baahan yahay xaqiijin si loo isticmaalo sifooyinka abuurista sawirka. Fadlan xaqiiji: https://platform.openai.com/settings/organization/general.
errors.rateLimitExceeded: Codsiyo aad u badan. Fadlan sug daqiiqad kadib isku day mar kale.
errors.server: Khalad server. Fadlan isku day goor dambe.
errors.unauthorized: Fadlan gasho si aad u sii waddo.
errors.unexpected: Khalad lama filaan ah ayaa dhacay.
errors.userNotRegistered: Waa inaad dhammaystirtaa diiwaangelinta ka hor inta aadan sii wadin.
errors.validation: Fadlan hubi xogtaada oo isku day mar kale.
errors.workshopInactive: Workshop-kan waa la naafoobay. Fadlan la xiriir macallinka ama qabanqaabiyaha workshop-ka.

empty.description: Bilow inaad ciyaarto ciyaaro si aad halkan ugu aragto, ama abuuro ciyaartaada!

infoModal.body:
Waxaad gashay habka aqoon-is-weydaarsiga. Inta aad ku jirto habkan, wax walba oo aad samayso waxaa lala xiriirinayaa aqoon-is-weydaarsigan - ciyaaraha aad abuurto, fadhiyada aad ciyaarto, iyo isku-xirrada aad wadaagto.

Mar kasta waad ka bixi kartaa. Ka bixitaanku ma joojinayo aqoon-is-weydaarsiga mana tirtirayo wax kasta oo aad abuurtay.
infoModal.headStaffNote: Waxaad mar kasta dib uga soo geli kartaa aqoon-is-weydaarsigan liiska aqoon-is-weydaarsiyada ururkaaga.
infoModal.individualNote: Si aad dib ugu soo laabato ka dib markaad baxdo, waxaad u baahan doontaa casuumad cusub oo ka timid qabanqaabiyeyaasha aqoon-is-weydaarsiga.
infoModal.title: Ku soo dhowow {{name}}

settings.notInWorkshopMode: Ma joogtid habka workshop. Fadlan marka hore geli workshop.
